steps.title: Use the circle standard form
steps.content: A circle with center $(h,k)$ and radius $r$ has equation $(x-h)^2+(y-k)^2=r^2$.

steps.title: Match the center coordinate
steps.content: The given center is $(8,5)$. In the form $(x-h)^2+(y-k)^2=b$, the value of $h$ is the $x$-coordinate of the center. The answer is 8.
